# Deepak Jha — dpkay.com

> Full-Stack Architect & Product Builder with 10+ years of engineering experience.

## About

Deepak Jha specializes in distributed systems, real-time platforms, and cloud-native architecture. He has designed and shipped high-availability infrastructure serving thousands of concurrent users across multiple regions — in domains spanning IoT, enterprise security, and retail. Based in India, collaborating with teams globally.

## Contact

- Email: hello@dpkay.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/dpkjha
- GitHub: https://github.com/dpkay-io
- Blog: https://medium.com/@dpkay

## Key Experience Areas

- High-availability video surveillance (8,000+ concurrent cameras, multi-region)
- Real-time dashboards with custom Canvas rendering (millions of data points at 60 FPS)
- E-commerce middleware with offline state resolution and transactional consistency

## Core Tech Stack

- Backend: C# / .NET, Node.js, Go, Rust
- Frontend: React / Next.js, TypeScript
- Cloud: AWS, Azure, Redis, SQL / NoSQL
- Mobile: Flutter / React Native, Kotlin / Android
- Realtime: WebSockets / SignalR, WebRTC
- AI: Agentic AI systems

## Personal Projects

- Terminal Studio: GPU-accelerated terminal multiplexer (Rust, wgpu, egui) — https://github.com/dpkay-io/terminal-studio
- gitreg: Zero-latency Git repository registry (Rust) — https://github.com/dpkay-io/gitreg
- claude-ticker: Real-time status bar for Claude CLI (TypeScript) — https://www.npmjs.com/package/claude-ticker
- splitgame: Split-terminal games for Claude Code (TypeScript, MCP) — https://www.npmjs.com/package/splitgame
- ttag: Dynamic terminal tab coloring (Go) — https://github.com/dpkay-io/ttag
- TogglDev: Android Developer Options toggle (Kotlin) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.dpkay.apps.developer_options_toggler
- AfterCall Shield: Post-call overlay dismissal (Kotlin) — https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.dpkay.apps.after_call_cleaner
- Workspace ID Pro: VS Code workspace identity extension (TypeScript) — https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=dpkay.ws-id
